# Iso 42005 Impact MCP

> 🧱 Part of the MEOK Governance Substrate

`iso-42005-impact-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install iso-42005-impact-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx iso-42005-impact-mcp
```

## Tools

- `list_phases` — List the 6 ISO/IEC 42005 lifecycle phases.
- `impact_categories` — List the 7 impact categories ISO/IEC 42005 evaluates.
- `assess_phase`
- `run_full_impact_assessment`
- `sign_attestation`
- `cross_walk_eu_ai_act`
- `cross_walk_iso_42001` — Map ISO 42005 outputs to ISO 42001 AIMS clauses.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/iso-42005-impact-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/iso-42005-impact-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
